# D1 Doppler dynamics exploration, June 2026

Generated by `mix run test/fixtures/rtk/generators/rover_measurement_2026_06.exs --d1`.
Per-run JSON was emitted to `/tmp/d1-doppler-dynamics-2026-06-results.json`.

This archived campaign report is the D1 evidence used for the promoted velocity-propagated prediction branch. The filter accepts caller-derived ECEF `:velocity_mps` on each epoch; it does not ingest raw Doppler. Ambiguity states and process-noise meaning stay unchanged, and the C2 kernel hard screen remains k=5.000 with min rows 8.

## Commits

| Repo | Commit |
|---|---|
| orbis | `392b9f83f2e6fcfa76af4e4e7d17128e17e3feb7` |
| astrodynamics | `7e6a08d4d01ac3c618902d5a913b807aefb743a9` |

## Doppler coverage

| Arc | Carries D1C | Matched epochs | D1C epochs | Epoch coverage | GPS C1C obs | GPS D1C obs | Obs coverage |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| gsdc_2021_08_04_sjc1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | pass | 1453 | 1453 | 100.000% | 13994 | 13994 | 100.000% |
| gsdc_svl1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | pass | 3136 | 3136 | 100.000% | 25633 | 25633 | 100.000% |
| gsdc_2021_12_15_mtv1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | pass | 1465 | 1465 | 100.000% | 12800 | 12800 | 100.000% |
| gsdc_2021_12_28_mtv1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | pass | 1610 | 1610 | 100.000% | 14809 | 14809 | 100.000% |

Coverage is measured over phone RINEX epochs that match the oracle GPST epoch list. Observation coverage is GPS D1C count paired with GPS C1C divided by GPS C1C count.

## Velocity quality

| Arc | Applied sign | Rover solved/eligible | Rover vel err median m/s | Rover vel err p95 m/s | Rover/truth speed med m/s | Base raw speed med m/s | Base inverted speed med m/s | Base applied med/p95 m/s |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| gsdc_2021_08_04_sjc1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | raw (raw_rinex_default_no_base_doppler) | 1453/1453 | 0.237 | 1.206 | 3.027/3.197 | no D obs | no D obs | no D obs |
| gsdc_svl1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | raw (raw_rinex_default_no_base_doppler) | 3136/3136 | 0.271 | 1.417 | 7.937/7.930 | no D obs | no D obs | no D obs |
| gsdc_2021_12_15_mtv1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | raw (raw_rinex_default_no_base_doppler) | 1465/1465 | 0.250 | 1.513 | 24.180/24.210 | no D obs | no D obs | no D obs |
| gsdc_2021_12_28_mtv1_pixel5_p222_grec_l1_demo5 | raw (raw_rinex_default_no_base_doppler) | 1610/1610 | 0.258 | 1.267 | 25.685/25.784 | no D obs | no D obs | no D obs |

Rover velocity is solved from phone GPS D1C at each epoch using the broadcast-code SPP position for that same epoch. Truth velocity is a finite difference of the oracle ECEF truth positions. Base rows are static P222 sanity checks over the same time span when base Doppler exists; otherwise the table reports the missing base Doppler explicitly and the sign basis falls back to the raw RINEX convention.

## Verdict

Verdict: clears_memoryless_only. Best pooled median was 7.345 m at sigma 0.500 m. Best complete pooled median was 7.345 m at sigma 0.500 m. Memoryless bar (9.533 m): pass. demo5 bar (4.007 m): miss.
